marketing.subtitle: 10 years of fundamentals, a DCF calculator that autofills, and AI Insights — free. Serious analysis for long-term investors.

snapshot.naGeneric: No data available for this company.
snapshot.naMargin: Margin not reported — common for banks and insurers, which have no cost of goods (COGS).
snapshot.naPrice: Unavailable: depends on the live price, which hasn't loaded yet.

dcf.title: DCF Calculator
dcf.subtitle: Estimate a company's intrinsic value using the discounted cash flow method.
dcf.educationalWarning: A DCF is a model, not a crystal ball. The output is extremely sensitive to your growth assumptions and discount rate (WACC). Use it as one of several analysis tools — never as investment advice.
dcf.loadError: Could not load data for this company.
dcf.waccHint: Required return. Higher means a more conservative value.
dcf.undervalued: Potentially undervalued versus the estimated fair value.
dcf.overvalued: Potentially overvalued versus the estimated fair value.
dcf.disclaimer: Values are an estimate based on your assumptions. They are not a buy or sell recommendation.

saved.title: My analyses
saved.empty: You haven't saved any analysis for this company yet.

dcf.errorWacc: WACC must be greater than perpetual growth for the model to be valid. Adjust the sliders.
dcf.errorShares: Enter the number of shares outstanding to compute value per share.
dcf.errorFcf: Enter a valid initial Free Cash Flow to start.

calendar.title: Earnings Calendar
calendar.subtitle: Track the earnings report dates of the companies we cover.
calendar.disclaimer: Future dates are estimates from the data sources and may change. Always confirm on the company's investor relations page.
calendar.empty: No earnings scheduled in this period.

screener.title: Stock Screener
screener.subtitle: Find high-quality companies based on your own criteria.

filters.title: Criteria
filters.moatTooltip: Companies with massive pricing power (Margin > 40%) and high capital efficiency (ROIC > 15%).
filters.magicTooltip: Joel Greenblatt's Strategy (Testing Phase). Focuses on high ROIC (Capital Efficiency), ignoring absolute margins.

results.emptyDesc: Try adjusting your filters to broaden the search.
